name: ONITY GROUP INC.
summary: PART I When we use the terms Onity, ONIT, we, us and our, we are referring to Onity Group Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. OVERVIEW We are a financial services company that services and originates both forward and reverse mortgage loans, through our primary brands, PHH Mortgage and Liberty Reverse Mortgage.
